description: The StaticTexture3D component represents a bunch of textures stacked on top of each other to make a 3D grid of pixel values, as a Texture3D. These textures can be displayed in 3D, or sampled via 3D positions in a few different components or in ProtoFlux Nodes. When importing a Texture3D, this component is usually applied after the import.

fields.URL: The address of the texture asset
fields.Uncompressed: Whether to not compress the texture's size before loading into ram/vram. doesn't affect cloud size.
fields.DirectLoad: Whether to not cache the texture in the local cache for Resonite
fields.ForceExactVariant: Whether to not generate variants for this texture and force a certain texture type
fields.PreferredFormat: The format to use for texture compression rather than the auto picked one
fields.PreferredProfile: The color profile to use rather than the auto picked one. (usually linear)
fields.Readable: Whether or not the texture can be sampled via texture sampling ProtoFlux nodes

methods.InvertRGB: Inverts the colors of the image.
methods.InvertR: Inverts the red channel of the image.
methods.InvertG: Inverts the green channel of the image.
methods.InvertB: Inverts the blue channel of the image.
methods.InvertA: Inverts the alpha channel of the image.
methods.ColorToAlpha: Turns the color data of the image into transparency/alpha data.
methods.AlphaFromIntensity: Makes alpha/transparency data depending on the color intensity of the image.
methods.AlphaToMask: Turns the alpha of the image into a black and white image.
methods.RemoveAlpha: Removes the alpha data completely from the image or makes it white.
methods.GrayscaleAverage: Make grayscale image based on the average values for the colors per pixel.
methods.GrayscaleLuminance: Make grayscale image based on the color luminance per pixel.
methods.SwapRG: Swaps the red and green channels on the image
methods.SwapRB: Swaps the red and blue channels on the image
methods.SwapRA: Swaps the red and alpha channels on the image
methods.SwapGB: Swaps the green and blue channels on the image
methods.SwapGA: Swaps the green and alpha channels on the image
methods.SwapBA: Swaps the blue and alpha channels on the image
methods.AddBackground: adds a background of a color to a transparent image.
methods.AdjustGamma: Adjusts the gamma of the image.
methods.AdjustAlphaGamma: Adjusts the gamma of the alpha channel of the image.
methods.ShiftHue: Shifts the hue of HSV of the image.
methods.SetHue: Sets the Hue of HSV of the image.
methods.SetSaturation: Sets the saturation of HSV of the image.
methods.OffsetSaturation: Adds to the saturation of HSV of the image.
methods.MulSaturation: Multiplies the saturation of HSV of the image.
methods.SetValue: Sets the value of HSV of the image.
methods.MulValue: Multiplies the value of HSV of the image.
methods.OffsetValue: Adds to the value of HSV of the image.
methods.OffsetAlpha: Adds to the alpha of the image.
methods.Normalize: Normalizes the colors of the image, making it have a bigger color range usage.

usage: Is generated automatically when importing a folder of images that are slices of a cube stacked vertically. Insert into a VolumeUnlitMaterial to view the colors or a LUT Material to view it's affect as a filter.
